mapper.content:
Dear {{2.answers.`58c39ba1`.textAnswers.answers[].value}},
Thank you for placing an order with The Quiet Bite by Debx. We appreciate your business and look forward to preparing your fresh lunch.
Your order details are confirmed below:
•	Item:{{2.answers.`0648c991`.textAnswers.answers[].value}}
•	Quantity: {{2.answers.`434f01ec`.textAnswers.answers[].value}}
Our team is dedicated to providing you with a high-quality, satisfying meal to power you through the rest of your day.
If you have any questions or need to make changes to your order, please do not hesitate to contact us. Thank you again for your support.
Warm regards,
The Quiet Bite by Debx Team
